_request_preview: [turn-1] What's my cost for a $500 doctor visit?
content: Hello Alice Hartwell (MBR-001, DOB: 1985-03-22), for a $500 doctor visit on your Silver plan, your cost depends on your deductible status. With $800 accrued toward your $2,000 deductible, you have $1,200 remaining. Since $500 is less than your remaining deductible, you would pay the full **$500** for this visit.
